// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// POSTPageIndexAdd references /add/
func POSTPageIndexAdd(query QueryPOSTPageIndexAdd) string {
	var (
		deltaStr string
	)

	if query.Delta != 0 {
		deltaStr = strconv.FormatInt(query.Delta, 10)
	}

	anyQuery := query.Delta != 0

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("@post('/add/") + len("')")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}
	n := 0
	if query.Delta != 0 {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		l += len("delta=") + len(deltaStr)
	}

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("@post('/add/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}
	n = 0
	if query.Delta != 0 {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		b.WriteString("delta=")
		b.WriteString(deltaStr)
	}
	b.WriteString("')")

	return b.String()
}

type QueryPOSTPageIndexAdd struct {
	Delta int64 `query:"delta"`
}
